title: AFFORDABLE AND ACCESSIBLE HOUSING - 211info
text: QUAD INC AFFORDABLE AND ACCESSIBLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates apartments with accommodations for independent living. Onsite 24/7 non-medical attendant care is available for residents and they receive a utility allowance. Properties available include studio, one, and two bedroom apartments. There may be waiting lists, dependent upon current unit availability. 6645 NE 78th Court Suite C7 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Low-income adults with disabilities who are primarily reliant on a wheelchair for mobility. Tenants must be medically stable and able to direct their own care and manage their personal needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 287-4260 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 287-4260 Main phone Main phone (503) 287-4260 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by property. For the majority, rent is based upon 30% of adjusted gross income. One property is low-income tax credit housing with rents based on income levels. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Cities of Gresham, Hillsboro, and Portland (Multnomah and Washington Counties only) Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. QUAD INC
